title: The Elementalist
description:
this datapack gives you a special power with the help of the 
elemental stick.
this datapack have a texture pack also - The Elementalist Rp
version
from 1.17 to latest
body:
Hello guys!

we meet again

This time I present you "THE ELEMENTALIST" pack.
its is a datapack.
this datapack gives you a special power with the help of the 
elemental stick.
to use the elemental stick.


you have to place the elemental stick in of-hand
and first 7 slot are the powers
click right to use the powers.


by using the elemental stick you can use 7 powers

1)Teleportation (Void)
2)Lighting bolt (Thunder)
3)summing creepers (Gravity Collapse )
4)torch/light (Light)
5)healing/positive effects/clear bad effects (Earth Healing)
6)water (Water)
7)air (Wind)

by using the elemental stick these powers will help you in various conditions.

You can craft the Elemental stick and also forge the Elemental stick
by using
1-diamond
1-emerald
1-stick
1-redstone dust
1-glowstone dust
1-sugar
1-gunpowder

for forging just throw these items in one place.

Optifine required for texture pack.

this datapack has a texture pack.

there are two packs

Datapack     - The Elementalist Dp 

Texture pack - The Elementalist Rp

make sure you download both packs for the better and complete experience.

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.17 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "THE ELEMENTALIST Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
